title: After the Arima Kinen: Magic that Changed the Future

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Ugh... You don't even look tired... It's so annoying!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Geez... Even she's gone all heart-eyes for you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess I can admit that you got everyone
way more excited than I did today.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So thanks, Sweep. That was a fun race.
